description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with a flat roof and clean, straight lines. The front facade is dominated by large, rectangular windows arranged in symmetrical rows, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The ground floor includes a covered porch area supported by square columns, with visible outdoor seating and a landscaped border. The rear and side elevations are mostly solid, with minimal window openings and a utilitarian service door at the back. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or stucco, with metal or glass window frames. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, emphasizing function and simplicity in an urban residential context.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large symmetrical windows and a covered front porch, featuring minimalist lines and a solid, boxy form.
description_view_0: Front view showing large windows, a covered porch with columns, outdoor seating, and landscaped border.
description_view_1: Side view with mostly solid wall, minimal window openings, and a glimpse of the front window arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view with a solid wall, a service door, and small utility features, lacking decorative elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a plain wall and a small utility panel, showing the edge of the front porch.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with square columns, large glass doors, and a landscaped border.
